entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop evaluated for resistance to seed infection by Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes seed infestation in groundnuts

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO SEED INFESTATION
entities.description: The ability of groundnut genotypes to resist infection by Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating groundnut genotypes in the field for resistance to seed infection

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: The research facility where groundnut screening was conducted

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The specific location of the ICRISAT center in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the initial field screening was conducted

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: The country where further screening of groundnut genotypes was conducted

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A severe environmental condition that played an important role in the effectiveness of the resistance screening

entities.name: IN VITRO COLONIZATION
entities.description: A laboratory method used to test the sensitivity of groundnut seeds to Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity measured by the amount of pods produced

entities.name: COMMERCIAL QUALITY
entities.description: The market quality of the groundnut pods
